criteria.criterion: Android app runs reliably on the active Android QA target.
criteria.notes: Samsung S23 is the primary Android runtime proof target and has passed the backend server-order proof; emulator remains fallback only when it is slow or stale.

criteria.criterion: iOS support is planned but not required for first done state.
Home, World Cup games, futures, event detail, props, and live markets are browsable.
criteria.notes: Long-running tracker shows verified Home, Games, Futures, Event Detail, grouped props, Search, and Live coverage.

criteria.criterion: Trade ticket supports Buy/Sell and orders/trades can be created against Holiwyn backend or documented local backend mode.
criteria.notes: Latest Samsung proof creates a quote-backed backend BUY order and confirms an OPEN order in Portfolio.

criteria.criterion: Portfolio shows positions, open orders, activity/history, and fake/backend-derived USDT balance.
criteria.notes: Portfolio proof includes backend position, open-order details, latest order card, and fake-token balance.

criteria.criterion: Login shell, Search, and English/Simplified Chinese switching work.
criteria.notes: Feature tracker marks account shell, search, preference persistence, and bilingual switching as verified.

criteria.criterion: No copied Polymarket assets or branding.
criteria.notes: Holiwyn branding is used; docs preserve the reference-only Polymarket guardrail.

criteria.criterion: Screenshots, loop reports, technical debt, and branch merge status are up to date.
criteria.notes: Cycles 277-279 are documented and locally merged; latest cleanup and proof screenshots are recorded.

criteria.criterion: Current Local MVP retail flow is ready for internal testing under the latest batch gate.
criteria.notes: Latest batch reports backend, DB, S23, root typecheck, Jest CI, mobile typecheck, and committed S23 proof aggregation ready with zero P0 blockers.

criteria.criterion: Provider-backed Polymarket match/line parity is current, tradable, and not relying on contract fixtures for MVP line markets.
criteria.notes: Current batch still tracks 4 provider P1 gap(s), so Local MVP readiness must not be mistaken for full Polymarket/provider parity.

criteria.criterion: Final cycle includes passing required harnesses, final QA report, final review report, final feature gap tracker, screenshots, and no unresolved P0 debt.
criteria.notes: This sweep is the final-cycle audit artifact, but a dedicated final QA/review signoff and P0 debt closeout still need one more review pass before declaring mission complete.

criteria.criterion: Samsung QA is moving off Expo Go toward dev build/APK.
criteria.notes: APK artifact exists and the Samsung APK smoke installed, launched, verified foreground focus, and found no crash dialog.

nextActions: Keep Local MVP testing on the contract-shaped line-market flow; do not declare full Polymarket/provider parity until the provider P1 blockers clear.
Run a final QA/review signoff pass and close or explicitly downgrade remaining P0 debt.
Keep Samsung server-order proof as the main real-device trading regression until the APK lane exists.
